en: A PSALM.Oh sing to the LORD a new song, for he has done marvelous things! His right hand and his holy arm have worked salvation for him.
zh: 你們要向耶和華唱新歌， 因為他行了奇妙的事； 他的右手和他的聖臂，為他施行拯救。

en: The LORD has made known his salvation; he has revealed his righteousness in the sight of the nations.
zh: 耶和華顯明了他的救恩， 在列國眼前顯示了他的公義。

en: He has remembered his steadfast love and faithfulness to the house of Israel. All the ends of the earth have seen the salvation of our God.
zh: 他記念他向以色列家所應許的慈愛和信實， 地的四極都看見我們 神的救恩。

en: Make a joyful noise to the LORD, all the earth; break forth into joyous song and sing praises!
zh: 全地都要向耶和華歡呼， 要發聲歡唱，要歌頌。

en: Sing praises to the LORD with the lyre, with the lyre and the sound of melody!
zh: 要彈琴歌頌耶和華， 要用琴和歌聲歌頌他；

en: With trumpets and the sound of the horn make a joyful noise before the King, the LORD!
zh: 要用號筒和號角的聲音， 在大君王耶和華面前歡呼。

en: Let the sea roar, and all that fills it; the world and those who dwell in it!
zh: 願海和海中充滿的，都翻騰響鬧， 願世界和住在世上的也都發聲；

en: Let the rivers clap their hands; let the hills sing for joy together
zh: 願江河拍手， 願群山一起歡呼；

en: before the LORD, for he comes to judge the earth. He will judge the world with righteousness, and the peoples with equity.
zh: 它們都要在耶和華面前歡呼， 因為他來是要審判全地， 他要按著公義審判世界， 憑著公正審判萬民。
